rulings.Case Title: MAGNOLIA MARTINEZ VS. JAVA ON OCEAN COFFEE HOUSE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc And Motion To Quash The Subpoena To Michelle Gomez
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 27, 2011. Line 3. PLAINTIFF MAGNOLIA MARTINEZ'S Notice of motion And Motion To Quash The Subpoena To Michelle Gomez. Motion to quash the subpoena to MIchelle Gomez for plaintiffs employment records, specifically performance evaluations, is Denied. Defendant has shown the information requested is directly relevant to Plaintiffs defamation claim and that Stacks refused to provide her with a letter of recommendation due to the alleged defamatory remarks. Defendant has also shown that this information can be provided through other less intrusive means. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: CROWN BUILDING MAINTENANCE, INC., A BUILDING VS. SBM SITE SERVICES, LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 27, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANT SBM SITE SERVICES, LLC DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER AS TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS IT IS BARRED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE WHICH DOES APPLY TO UCL CLAIMS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD SUFFICIENT FACTS TO SHOW IT SUFFERED DAMAGE OR LOSS BY DEFENDANT'S ALLEGED VIOLATION UNDER THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUFFICIENT FACTS THAT IT EXPENDED MONEY DUE TO DEFENDANT'S ACTS. IN LIGHT OF ITS RULING, THE COURT NEED NOT ADDRESS AT THIS TIME, THE ISSUE RAISED REGARDING THE PRAYER FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 27, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANT 490 POST STREET, LLC DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE ITS 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ADELE M. ROBERTS VS. RETIREMENT BOARD OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Per Ccp 1094.5
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, April 27, 2011, line 12, PETITIONER ADELE ROBERTS Motion For Writ Of Mandamus Per CCP 1094.5. MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS IS DENIED. PETITIONER HAS NOT SHOWN THAT RESPONDENT VIOLATED HOSFORD (1978) 77 CAL.APP.3RD 854. THERE WAS NO SHOWING THAT DR. VON ROGOV MISUNDERSTOOD PETITIONER'S ACTUAL DUTIES AND RESPONDENT REASONABLY RELIED ON THIS DR.'S ASSESSMENT. FURTHER, RESPONDENT'S REASONING IN THE DECISION AND RE-HEARING DECISION ARE COMPELLING. ACCORDINGLY, THE WRIT IS DENIED BECAUSE PETITIONER FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN UNDER FUKUDA V. CITY OF ANGELS (1999) 20 CAL.4TH 805, 817. =(302/LMG)
